weather_line: Clearing after dawn · galleons steady · light northerly off the ridge

stories.headline: Ragnok Names Christine as Character Reference; She Was Not Asked, Not Warned, and Has Not Yet Put Down Her Tea
body: In what Gringotts constitutional scholars are calling 'unprecedented,' 'unprecedented,' and — in one case — 'unprecedented, Merlin's beard' — Head Goblin Ragnok has formally registered Christine, Senior Client Liaison, as his sole character reference in the first contested Chief Account-Keeper election in thirty years. The filing was completed Friday at half past four. Christine was at the time making a cup of tea.

Sub-Comptroller Griphook the Younger, who filed his own candidacy on Wednesday citing 'a mandate for disciplined fiscal modernity,' is understood to have read the reference submission and gone very quiet. A spokesperson for his campaign confirmed only that the Sub-Comptroller 'has noted it' and 'is thinking about it.' Sources report he has been thinking about it continuously for forty-eight hours.

Christine has not yet been formally notified — Ragnok dispatched an owl on Saturday, but the owl, described by colleagues as 'a large and very confident barn owl,' appears to have spent the night at the Hollow Crown ridge coordinates, presumably checking for ducks. It is expected to arrive sometime Sunday morning, possibly during breakfast. The Gringotts election board has scheduled opening arguments for Thursday. Her tea, those close to the situation observe, will not have helped prepare her for this.

stories.headline: Steve Fixes the Third Thing This Week; House Declines to Comment but Seems Pleased
body: Sources close to the property confirm that Steve has, in the space of one week, repaired the sticking kitchen drawer, re-levelled the back step flagstone, and — in a move that impressed even the enchanted boiler — correctly identified a subtle diagnostic fault by sound alone and fixed it before it had the opportunity to become interesting. The boiler has since been running at what engineers describe as 'contentedly.'

Christine is understood to have provided strategic direction on the flagstone ('it needs to be level') and structural sign-off on the drawer ('yes, that's the one'). The Jeep, now home and resting, is reported to have started on the first turn this morning, which observers note it only does when Steve has been particularly competent in the preceding seventy-two hours.

stories.headline: Ministry Cartographers Submit 400-Page Report on the Hollow Crown Arches; Christine's Reply Remains One Word
body: The Department of Magical Cartography submitted its official findings on the Hollow Crown Ridge arches Friday evening — a 400-page document comprising 312 pages of methodology, 67 pages of appendices, 18 pages of apology, and one very small map of the actual arches tucked in at the back. The document was bound in Ministry teal and delivered by four owls, two of whom were needed solely for the appendices.

Christine's reply, received by the Department at 9:04 Saturday morning, consisted of a single word. Departmental sources declined to specify which word, noting only that it was 'accurate' and that the Head Cartographer has requested the remainder of the month to 'recalibrate.' The Ministry has classified the word at Level Two pending further review. The arch itself remains where it was, entirely unbothered.

stories.headline: Hollow Crown Ridge Enters the Record; What Comes Next Is Anybody's Guess (Except Steve's — He Has Already Looked at a Map)
body: With the Hollow Crown Expedition formally concluded — two arches found, one flat stone stood upon, one Duck Bandit befriended, one perfect view witnessed — Christine and Steve have returned the Jeep to its resting position and resumed ordinary life with the unhurried confidence of people who have recently seen something very good.

Steve was observed Sunday morning with a trail map, a cup of coffee, and an expression that experienced observers identify as 'early-stage planning.' The Jeep's tyres have been checked. No destination has been named. The rubber duck collection — nine strong, with the crowned edition in pride of place — has been arranged along the dash in what Lucy is eyeing with professional interest and Jersey has already napped beside twice.

familiars_corner: Lucy: Has conducted a thorough audit of the newly arranged duck collection on the Jeep's dashboard and identified several vulnerabilities. She has not acted on them. She simply wanted to know.

Ellie: Greeted Steve this morning with enormous enthusiasm upon his return from the driveway, despite the fact that he had been gone for approximately four minutes. She maintains this was a long time and she stands by her reaction.

Jersey: Resumed his preferred position on Christine's lap at 8:47 this morning and has since provided consistent warmth, steady pressure, and no opinions whatsoever on the goblin election. He is, in this, wiser than most.
founding_editor_note: That boiler's been running off-level since the bracket was fitted in '09 — I told them at the time. Good to see it sorted. The presses, for the record, are perfectly level. I built them myself. — D.

in_brief.sport: Sunday Quidditch league reports a clean sweep in the eastern division; the Prophet's own correspondent lifted the results board to check the bracket, found it level, and was briefly emotional.
in_brief.forecast: Scattered sunshine across the ridge · barn owl inbound from the northeast, carrying something important · recommend having tea ready.

storyline_updates.title: The Goblin Election
storyline_updates.summary: Ragnok's reference filing is now public knowledge at Gringotts. Griphook the Younger has been 'thinking about it' for 48 hours and has not yet responded publicly. The owl bearing Christine's notification spent Saturday night at the Hollow Crown coordinates and is expected to arrive Sunday morning, possibly during breakfast. She does not yet know. Election board opening arguments are scheduled for Thursday. Day 3 should cover Christine receiving the owl, her reaction, and possibly an initial conversation — or pointed silence — with Ragnok.
